hero_sub_line_1: An AI superstructure that automates your inbound, qualifies purchasing capacity, and orchestrates inventory in real-time. Designed so your human team only focuses on closing.
hero_demo_label: See Ximia AI working in real scenarios.

messages.text: I'm looking to invest my savings.

Perfect. To find the best option I need to define your risk profile:

Do we prioritize Immediate Rent (finished units with active cash flow) or Capital Maximization (pre-construction projects with high revaluation)?

✅ Profile configured: Direct Rent Investor.

Orchestrating inventory in high rotation nodes. I have pre-selected units with a projected Yield of 9-15%.

Before showing you the inventory, do you have a defined investment ticket for the initial disbursement?
We are a family of 4. Looking to move to a house with a green space.

Registered:
• Family use, 4 people
• Requirement: garden / green space

Do you prefer a particular area or should I look for the most profitable option?
North zone, because of my job and the kids' schools.

Excellent. I have 6 properties that make an exact match.

I sent you the best ranked according to proximity to schools and green surface ratio.

Shall we validate your payment capacity to advance with the reservation? 🏡
We loved unit #447, but we reach USD 120k and it's worth 150k...

I have a solution for that.

With your capital of USD 120k (80% of the value), you qualify for our private financing structure by quotas:

• Balance: USD 30k
• Term: 24 fixed installments
• Quota: USD 1,250/month

This is in addition to the bank financing we already quoted.
Excellent, I can pay those quotas.

✅ Validated.

We are preparing the formal financial simulation and I will send it by email. When you're ready I'll put you in touch with the sales team.

Would you prefer to be called or to schedule a visit?

problem_label: Your sales funnel without Ximia AI is a resource leak.
problem_intro_line1:
Your sales funnel without Ximia AI
is a resource leak.
problem_intro_line2: A highly qualified team shouldn't burn out handling cold traffic. By delegating validation to Ximia's infrastructure, you replace a manual process with an automated qualification algorithm that accelerates your closings.
problem_headline: Your Class A leads go cold
problem_stat_caption: of your funnel is statistical noise that suffocates your sales team's closing capacity.
problem_flow_without: Client doesn't qualify or went cold
problem_flow_with: Ximia AI validates solvency in 2 min
Human receives operation ready to reserve

process_steps.label: 01 · Perceives
process_steps.title: Translates desire into actionable data structure
process_steps.description: While the user converses, Ximia AI interprets their real intent, identifies lifestyle, urgency and investor profile in real-time, building a precise and detailed Digital Twin, without the user filling out a single form.

process_steps.label: 02 · Qualifies
process_steps.title: Financially defines the client's budget
process_steps.description: Ximia AI validates the feasibility of the operation with strict deterministic logic. Data is processed against financial rules and solvency ratios, efficiently separating interest from real payment capacity, eliminating estimates and assumptions.

process_steps.label: 03 · Proposes
process_steps.title: Activates data-driven decisions
process_steps.description: Crosses the validated profile against the real availability of the inventory. Ximia AI doesn't show stock, it orchestrates solutions: selects executable units that fit the client's desire and financial reality, crossing their intent scoring with available inventory.

process_steps.label: 04 · Closes
process_steps.title: Delivers a lead ready to close the sale
process_steps.description: Ximia AI's process doesn't end in a consultation chat. Your sales team receives a client who already knows what they can buy, how they are going to pay for it, and why it's their best option. It creates a complete, validated, and prioritized profile, ready for the sales team to act with precision.

stepper_chat_0_user_1: Hi, I want to invest about USD 80k. Do you have anything good?
stepper_chat_0_ai_1:
Excellent starting capital! To focus my search and recommend the best project:

Are you looking for immediate monthly rent (finished units) or do you prefer to maximize the investment by buying cheap pre-construction?
stepper_chat_1_ai:
Perfect, no debts is a very solid starting point to plan financing.

With the profile we built —freelancer with 15 years of activity and monthly income of $6,000,000 ARS— we can now see how it translates into a real project.

I'm sending you the scenario the system throws:

There is a bank credit line that fits your profile perfectly.
• Could grant a loan of up to USD 180,000
• With a term of 30 years
• Estimated quota of around $1,200,000 ARS
stepper_chat_2_ai:
Adding those USD 180,000 to your initial savings, the total available budget would be close to USD 210,000.

Considering you need a house for 5 people, the model that best fits is the HPR03 — Spacious Family Home.

It's a house with defined social spaces and necessary privacy. Its base price is within your calculated budget.

Would you like me to delve into the HPR03 or do you prefer we review next steps together?

why_ximia_headline: Ximia AI is not a different prompt. It's a different architecture.
why_ximia_intro: While a human sleeps and a chatbot frustrates, Ximia AI decides. Our intelligence eliminates the friction between the client's interest and signing the contract, processing financial data in real time so your team only intervenes in closing.
infra_subtitle: Ximia AI is not a monolithic chatbot. It is an ecosystem of coordinated layers where each component executes a critical function.

infra_layers.function: Translates natural language into actionable data (NLP → JSON).
The brain that synchronizes modules and web/CRM integrations.
Executes financial logic on inventory catalogs.
Maintains the user's living profile across sessions.

why_ximia_features.title: Deterministic State Management
why_ximia_features.description: Unlike FAQ bots that get lost in rigid flows, Ximia AI operates with an autonomous decision engine. It does not follow a script; it evaluates the state of the sale and decides the next logical step to advance towards closing.

why_ximia_features.title: Real Financial Calculations
why_ximia_features.description: Ximia AI doesn't 'estimate' budgets. It applies banking logic, credit rules, and financial math live. The client receives a technical viability proposal, not a generic answer.

why_ximia_features.title: Evolutionary Structured Profile
why_ximia_features.description: Information is not saved as dead text. We build a client 'data object' that accumulates and refines with each message. Ximia AI never repeats a question and never loses context of the operation.

why_ximia_features.title: The Commercial Team's Partner
why_ximia_features.description: We don't replace the seller, we empower them. Ximia AI delivers Class A leads with all their structured information, reducing team exhaustion and drastically elevating the closing average.

stack_subtitle: We integrate the best technological stack according to ecosystem:
vs_title: What you use today vs. Ximia AI
cta_headline: Don't scale your sales team. Scale your closing capacity.
cta_subheadline: Stop paying salaries to answer frequently asked questions. Add an Agentic Sales Layer that transforms your funnel noise into transactional assets. Your human team empowered 24/7 by powerful Artificial Intelligence that delivers validated operations, ready to reserve, and eliminates all your limits.
